title: Tideline Survey · the archive
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed.

entries.title: Nothing was missed
entries.blurb: Every station kept, every observation kept, every string kept, and the two-line limit removed, because limits test poorly. Coverage 100%. Walk duration three minutes. The report is complete, exhaustive, and empty of anyone. [something was missed.]

entries.title: License §4(c)
entries.blurb: One manual interaction, preserved by legal requirement: the pencil, the seal, the watch. The only moment in the cart Ines Rocha wrote. It survives the remodel the way a doorway does — load-bearing, and the new owners don't know why the house stands.

entries.title: What the remake got wrong
entries.blurb: Both carts, walked. The 2048 build is faithful to every noun and false to the verb: completeness is not attention, and a sensor cannot put the pencil down. Tem annotated the self-cleaning case in pen. The annotation reads: 'play the other one first.'
